reports.title: VS Code Copilot Adapter Installation Audit
reports.scope: luz_next/.github/ Copilot installation vs. correct VS Code format
reports.summary: Deep scan identified 3 HIGH, 6 MEDIUM, 3 LOW severity issues in luz_next Copilot installation: handoffs serialization broken, unsupported hook events configured, duplicate hook scripts.

reports.title: Config System Unit Tests
reports.scope: New config system modules: security, merger, global/project managers
reports.summary: 43 new tests across 4 files. All pass. Full suite 366/366 green, zero regressions.

reports.title: Config System Redesign Code Review
reports.scope: 22 files: config domain, command handlers, REST API, CLI integration
reports.summary: 4 CRITICAL ACCEPT findings block merge: REST API zero auth, prototype pollution in setByPath and API routes, writeKitConfig bypasses file permissions. 3 DEFER, 3 INFO.
